differential_diagnoses: Postpartum major depressive disorder with peripartum onset
next_steps: Perform a comprehensive risk assessment for self-harm and infanticide
Initiate or optimize evidence-based pharmacotherapy, such as high-dose SSRIs or SNRIs
Provide psychoeducation to the patient and family regarding the nature of ego-dystonic intrusive thoughts to reduce shame and anxiety
Ensure close outpatient monitoring with frequent clinical contact
Consider referral to specialized perinatal psychiatric services or intensive outpatient programs
Maintain a supportive environment with appropriate family supervision for infant safety
Avoid unnecessary invasive neurological testing in the absence of focal neurological deficits
